evals.prompt: Set up a sweeper dashboard for stale CMO content queue rows. It should propose actions but not post anything.
evals.expected_output: Creates or describes a sweeper workspace with item records, README dashboard, proposed-vs-applied separation, and no external posting.

evals.prompt: Turn these JobZoom leads into a conservative review loop so we can reject obvious misses and keep strategic edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Defines JobZoom-specific categories, item record format, dashboard metrics, and human-review rules for edge cases.

evals.prompt: Create a README-as-dashboard status loop for OpenClaw health findings and failed crons.
evals.expected_output: Produces a scan/propose/apply workflow with health-specific safety constraints and no casual gateway restart.
